title: Email Marketing Campaigns

posts.author: KatieFrank (Katie Frank)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello - I’m looking to see if anyone can share with me how they have set up their Marketing Operations board. More specifically, what triggers do you have in place? How do you make this a seamless process to repeat itself for each campaign? Any insight you have would be very helpful.

Thank you
Katie Frank
